# Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability that could impact end users or the Steam platform, please do not disclose it publicly.

Instead, we ask that you report the issue privately and responsibly by contacting one of our developers directly through secure channels. Responsible disclosure allows us to assess and address the issue before any public exposure.

We appreciate your help in keeping our users and the platform safe.

> [!NOTE]
> ### Where you can reach us:
> * [Github vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SteamClientHomebrew/Millennium/security)
> * [Our Discord server](https://steambrew.app/discord)
